name: Marshmallow Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over low heat, melt butterscotch chips and butter; allow to cool for 10 minutes.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat eggs, brown sugar, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Add the melted butterscotch mixture to the egg mixture and mix thoroughly.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the batter, stirring continuously.
6. Stir in marshmallows, chocolate chips, and chopped walnuts until evenly distributed.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 13-inch by 9-inch by 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool before cutting into serving portions.
Yield: 3 dozen
